chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-872 of 2023 (Khush Muhammad Vs. The State and others) DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For Orders on MA No. 7346/2023 (U/A) 2. For Orders on office objection.. 3. For Orders on MA No. 7347/2023. (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case. 11-12-2023. Mr. Khadim Hussain Malik, advocate for the applicant. ******** 1. Granted. 2. Over ruled. 3&4. The applicant by preferring the instant Crl. Misc. Application under section 561-A Cr.P.C has impugned order dated 23-11-2023 passed by learned Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki, whereby his application under section 22 A/B Cr.P.C for issuance of direction against the police to record his FIR has been dismissed. Apparently, there is dispute between the parties over landed property and both of the parties are litigating with each other since long on same issue. In these premises, learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace was right to dismiss the application of the applicant u/s 22 A/B Cr.P.C by way of impugned order, it is not found illegal to be interfered with by this Court by way of instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 561-A Cr. P.C, it is dismissed in limine, directing the applicant to exhaust his remedy u/s 200 Cr.P.C, if so is advised to him. Judge Nasim/P.A 2
